title: The Throwable Interface
description: Understand the base interface for all errors and exceptions.

slides.title: Throwable
Error Class
Catching Errors
slides.codeSnippet:
<?php
try {
    function add(int $a, int $b) { return $a + $b; }
    add('abc', 5);
} catch (TypeError $e) {
    echo "Type error: " . $e->getMessage();
}
?>

quizData.question: What interface is implemented by both Exception and Error?
quizData.explanation: Throwable is the base interface for all errors and exceptions.
